CustomField.description: Updated to ensure proper handling of segmented v. non-segmented lines as a part of BIZ-61867
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( OR( SBQQ__Quote__r.SegmentIndex_Max_Value__c = 0, AND(SBQQ__Quote__r.SegmentIndex_Max_Value__c > 0, ISBLANK(SBQQ__RequiredBy__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__RequiredBy__c)) ), SBQQ__SegmentIndex__c = 0 ), 1, SBQQ__SegmentIndex__c )
CustomField.label: SegmentIndex (Year)
